summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the rebuilt Training Programs page. All features working correctly including Hero section with 'Training Programs' heading and 'Strong & Mobile' label, tabbed navigation (All/Foundation/Beginner/Intermediate), 3 program cards with level badges, program names, descriptions, durations, and 'Start Program' buttons. Program detail views working with hero, problem-solution storytelling, program overview (6 feature cards), testimonials, FAQ accordion (expand/collapse), and final CTA. Back navigation and tab filtering all functional.
passed_tests: Programs hero: 'Training Programs' heading visible
Programs hero: 'Strong & Mobile' label visible
Tab navigation: All 4 tabs (All, Foundation, Beginner, Intermediate) present and clickable
Tab filtering: 'All' tab shows 3 program cards
Tab filtering: 'Foundation' tab shows 1 card (Foundations)
Tab filtering: 'Beginner' tab shows 1 card (Beginner)
Tab filtering: 'Intermediate' tab shows 1 card (Intermediate)
Program cards: Level badge visible on each card
Program cards: Program name visible (Strong & Mobile — Foundations/Beginner/Intermediate)
Program cards: Duration visible (8 Weeks, 12 Weeks, 16 Weeks)
Program cards: 'Start Program' button present on each card
Program detail: Clicking Foundations card opens detail view
Program detail: Hero shows 'Strong & Mobile — Foundations' title
Program detail: 'Back to Programs' link present and functional
Program detail: 'Start Program' CTA button in hero
Problem section: Problem headline visible
Problem section: Solution box visible
Program overview: 6 feature cards displayed
Testimonials: Section with student testimonials visible
FAQ accordion: 4 FAQ items present
FAQ accordion: Click to expand shows answer
FAQ accordion: Click again to collapse
Back navigation: Returns to programs listing view
Why Structured Training: Old vs new comparison content visible
CTA section: 'Not Sure Where to Start?' heading visible
CTA section: 'Book a Free Consultation' button present
Beginner detail: Hero shows 'Strong & Mobile — Beginner'
Intermediate detail: Hero shows 'Strong & Mobile — Intermediate'
Final CTA: 'Ready to Start?' section with 'Start Program' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Programs page completely rebuilt and tested. All sections working: Hero with 'Strong & Mobile' branding and 'Training Programs' heading, tabbed navigation (All/Foundation/Beginner/Intermediate) with proper filtering, 3 program cards (Foundations 8 weeks, Beginner 12 weeks, Intermediate 16 weeks). Program detail views include: hero with back navigation, problem-solution storytelling, program overview with 6 feature cards, testimonials section, FAQ accordion (4 items with expand/collapse), and final CTA. Page uses React state (selectedProgram) to toggle between listing and detail views - not URL routing. All data-testids working correctly: tab-all, tab-foundation, tab-beginner, tab-intermediate, program-card-foundations, program-card-beginner, program-card-intermediate, program-detail-hero-{id}, back-to-programs, detail-start-btn, final-start-btn, programs-consult-btn.
